title: pelargonium × smyrniifolium
intro: Pelargonium × smyrniifolium, also known as the Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species in the family Geraniaceae, derived from the natural cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium tomentosum. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps and digestive issues. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
